title: Archetypal Pattern
definition: The repeating sequence (Ah, Mmm, N, Silence) that represents the fundamental pattern of manifestation itself.

difficulty_levels.beginner: The idea that there's a simple model explaining the entire universe, represented by the sequence AUM.
difficulty_levels.intermediate: A pattern reflecting the stages of potentiality, expression, sustainment, dissolution, and potentiality once again as described in the sequence AUM.
difficulty_levels.expert: The philosophical perspective that the universe follows a repeating, self-sustaining sequence, reminiscent of AUM, from the Big Bang to the Quantum Vacuum.

extra_fields.insight: AUM as a single, breath-length model of everything.
